message:
fix(conformance/io): add explicit tempfile::TempDir type annotations

Adds explicit type annotations (let dir: tempfile::TempDir = ...) to
three conformance test functions (io_001_file_write_read,
io_002_file_seek, io_006_buffered_io). This makes the binding type
unambiguous at the call site and prevents potential type inference
surprises if the tempfile crate API changes. The annotation also serves
as documentation for readers unfamiliar with the tempdir() return type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
